omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We collect contact information. For example, we collect personal identification data, online or in person, among other purposes, to manage your registration as a user, to manage your purchases of products or services, to respond to your queries, and, if you wish, to send you our customized including name, mailing address, email addresses and phone numbers. If you register as a user, we will also have you create a password. In some cases, we may share this information for the purpose noted above.
